рЯУЛ style(s) in the IST list with no outward in MB51 вАФ probably not invoiced yet (ignored)
Output is an exact copy of the E-tail Lite template вАФ same 4 sheets, same fixed values, same cell formats.
Positive quantities in MB51 are ignored automatically (not real outward). With an IST list uploaded, only styles on the list (donor = your store) become waybills вАФ normal outward is excluded. вЪ† amber notes flag IST-vs-GRN destination differences. Red rows are missing address/pin вАФ fill or untick.
